title: European Buyers Eye Canadian LNG to Diversify Supply
summary: European energy companies are eyeing purchases of Canadian liquefied natural gas in search of supply diversification in challenging times, according to a Reuters report citing unnamed sources familiar with the matter. European energy buyers are already big clients of U.S. LNG producers, but long-te…

title: Oil Prices Steady as Traders Balance Diplomatic Progress With Physical Shortages
summary: Oil prices were flat in early Asian trade on Thursday as tentative signs of diplomatic progress between Washington and Tehran were offset by continued and intensifying supply tightness. At the time of writing, WTI was trading at $91.38, up just 0.1%, while Brent was up 0.04% at $94.97. Oil prices r…
